title: Alytus, Alytus County — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Alytus, Alytus County: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Alytus is a city in Alytus County with a population of 55,000. The largest city in southern Lithuania, known for its location on the Nemunas River, the Alytus Zoo, and a growing industrial and logistics sector.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
